name: Dark Gawain
title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
description: Arthur Leidram wasn't Gawain's king anymore, she was a mass murderer—and yet, some part of Gawain must have still wanted to believe in her. It was hard to accept the fact that the ruler she once knew—noble and ready to risk her life for the people of Camelot—was just an act all along.

localization.name: Cursed Blade
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. If not burning, that enemy will also be granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, and the user will be granted Sleep Thorns. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This lock may be ignored if allies have 0 Spirit.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying.

localization.name: Cursed Battlecry
localization.description:
All non-burning allies are granted the Armor status effect, Sleep Thorns and become Enraged. Each non-burning, non-sleeping enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU. At the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy with Mega Poison or Cursed Sleep on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite other status effects and previous Enrage skills on affected units.
localization.selected:
Armor & Enrage allies, Poison & Sleep enemies
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Cursed Helioslash
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and the Stealth Status Effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Cursed End
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.
localization.selected: Damages an enemy, ignores defeat prevention

localization.name: Killer Thorns
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

All non-burning allies gain Sleep Thorns. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield.

If this unit has Sleep Thorns, this unit cannot be granted Poison, Sleep, or Stuns. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

localization.name: Omega Breaker
localization.description:
This unit has 10% plus 10% per Awakening (up to 50% max if this unit has 4 Awakenings) bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or sleeping.

If this unit damages at least one enemy that is poisoned or sleeping with an attack, this unit will get another turn and heal for 50% of its max HP. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.sword Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greatswords.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
